<!------------------------------------------->
<!--- Detalhamento Função Github Document --->
<!------------------------------------------->
:::{.content-visible when-format = 'gfm'}
```r
ipeadata_query (ipeadata_series_code, ipeadata_series_name, time_interval, source_github = TRUE)
```
:::
  
<!------------------------------->
<!--- Detalhamento Função PDF --->
<!------------------------------->
:::{.content-visible when-format = 'pdf'}
\begin{functioncard}
\texttt{$\textbf{ipeadata\_query} (ipeadata\_series\_code, ipeadata\_series\_name, time\_interval, source\_github = TRUE)$}
\end{functioncard}
:::
  
<!-------------------------------->
<!--- Detalhamento Função HTML --->
<!-------------------------------->
:::{.content-visible when-format = 'html'}
<div class = 'function_card'> 
ipeadata_query (ipeadata_series_code, ipeadata_series_name, time_interval, source_github = TRUE)
</div>
:::
